author: gb9t
content: Iter 60 result: kernel/time/timer.md (timer-wheel - timer.c ~2580 lines; per-CPU 9-level cascading wheel + 576 buckets + TIMER_DEFERRABLE/_PINNED/_IRQSAFE flags + TIMER_SOFTIRQ run + del_timer_sync wait-for-executing + NOHZ timer migration via tmigr) + virt/kvm/x86-pvclock.md (KVM paravirt clock kvmclock - in x86.c ~600+ lines; per-vCPU pvclock_vcpu_time_info 32-byte struct + version sequence-counter atomic-update + MSR_KVM_SYSTEM_TIME/_NEW + WALL_CLOCK + tsc_to_system_mul/shift + cpufreq-notifier integration + PVCLOCK_TSC_STABLE/_GUEST_STOPPED flags + live-migration pause). 70 Tier-3s total. Next iter: kernel/time/hrtimer.md + virt/kvm/x86-async-pf.md (async page fault paravirt).
